title: salix bellula
intro: Salix bellula, also known as dwarf willow or shrubby willow, is a small shrub-like tree that belongs to the Salicaceae family. The medicinal properties of Salix bellula lie in its bark, which contains salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. This plant is known for its various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Salix bellula typically involve the bark being dried and made into a tea or tincture for medicinal use.
